title: DirecTV Bluff City Law Premiere (NBC)
desc: DirecTV email promoting the premiere of NBC's legal drama Bluff City Law starring Jimmy Smits and Caitlin McGee, airing Mondays.

title: AT&T TV Apps Retiring Account Update
desc: AT&T U-verse account update notifying customers that some TV apps are being retired and pointing them to att.com/tvapp.

title: DirecTV NCAA March Madness Coverage
desc: DirecTV email promoting live NCAA March Madness tournament coverage across TBS, CBS, TNT and truTV, with AT&T as a proud partner.

title: DirecTV UFC 232 Jones vs Gustafsson Pay-Per-View
desc: DirecTV pay-per-view order email for UFC 232 (Jones vs. Gustafsson 2, Cyborg vs. Nunes) plus new movie releases.

title: DirecTV Win-Back Select Package Offer
desc: DirecTV win-back email offering a $39.99/mo Select package, AT&T Visa reward card and free premium channels to returning customers.

title: Toyota U.S. Figure Skating Partnership (Alysa Liu)
desc: Toyota email spotlighting its U.S. Figure Skating partnership and Team USA athlete Alysa Liu, tied to Olympic sponsorship and Toyotathon.

title: Amex Shop Small Accelerator Social Media Tips
desc: American Express merchant email promoting the Shop Small Accelerator with social media strategy tips and free marketing materials.

title: AT&T U-verse CBS Channels Restored Notice
desc: AT&T U-verse service message letting customers know CBS, CBS Sports and Smithsonian channels are back after a carriage agreement.

title: AT&T Internet HBO Max Included Activation
desc: AT&T Internet 1000 email announcing HBO Max is now included, with step-by-step activation instructions for the benefit.

title: Glo Find a Class Help & Recommendations
desc: Glo (YogaGlo) email offering personalized class suggestions from certified instructors plus a set of recommended yoga classes.

title: PNC Capital Advisors Q1 2021 Fixed Income Insights
desc: PNC Capital Advisors institutional email sharing first quarter 2021 fixed income market perspectives and thought-leadership articles.

title: Glo Meet Our Instructors
desc: Glo (YogaGlo) email introducing featured teachers including Elena Brower, Jason Crandell and Noah Levine.

title: DirecTV NFL Sunday Ticket Big Game Lounge Invite
desc: DirecTV email inviting NFL Sunday Ticket subscribers to an exclusive Big Game weekend lounge event in Atlanta.

title: DirecTV HBO & Cinemax Free Preview Weekend
desc: DirecTV email promoting a free HBO and Cinemax preview weekend featuring Game of Thrones marathons and blockbuster movies.

title: Toyota 2018 Mirai Fuel Cell Vehicle
desc: Toyota email showcasing the 2018 Mirai hydrogen fuel cell vehicle, its technology, complimentary fuel offer and new fueling stations.
